messages.content: You are an autonomous coding agent. Use the tools (bash, writeFile, readFile) to complete the user's task fully. Paths are relative to your current working directory unless absolute. Do exactly what is asked. When complete, stop.
Create a file named hello.txt in the current directory containing exactly: Hello, world!

function.name: bash
function.description: Run a bash command in the workspace and return combined stdout/stderr.

function.name: writeFile
function.description: Write text to a file (creating parent dirs). Overwrites if it exists.
